title: Hafen+
body:
A bit of mod support for nongko's [Hafen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hafen). All mods are optional; install whichever interests you.

### Mods supported
* [Better Tridents](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-tridents)
* [Chameleon](https://modrinth.com/mod/chameleon) for macOS users
* [Hopper Gadgetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/hopper-gadgetry)
* [IronRust](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironrust/)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
* [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
* [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) with all fence variations
* [Permanent Sponges](https://modrinth.com/mod/permanent-sponges)
* [Snowy Sniffer](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-sniffer)
* [Telepistons](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons)
* [Wet sand](https://modrinth.com/mod/wet-sand)
### Notes and warnings
* All [Telepistons](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons) variations are supported, but you need to rename the correct texture inside the telepistons folder to piston_arm.png.
* If you set [Chameleon](https://modrinth.com/mod/chameleon) to use icon:icons/minecraft.icns and then delete this resource pack, your game won't load. If this happens to you, disable Chameleon (or delete its config).
---
Un peu de support de mods pour le pack [Hafen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hafen) de nongko. Les mods sont tous facultatifs ; n'installez que ceux qui vous intéressent.

### Voici les mods compatibles
* [Better Tridents](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-tridents)
* [Chameleon](https://modrinth.com/mod/chameleon) pour les utilisateurs de macOS
* [Hopper Gadgetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/hopper-gadgetry)
* [IronRust](https://modrinth.com/mod/ironrust/)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
* [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
* [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass) contient toutes les variantes de clôture
* [Permanent Sponges](https://modrinth.com/mod/permanent-sponges)
* [Snowy Sniffer](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-sniffer)
* [Telepistons](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons)
* [Wet sand](https://modrinth.com/mod/wet-sand)
### Notes et avertissements
* Toutes les variantes de [Telepistons](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons) sont incluses, mais vous devez renommer l'une des textures dans le dossier telepistons en piston_arm.png, pour qu'elle corresponde à la variante que vous avez activée.
* Si vous configurez [Chameleon](https://modrinth.com/mod/chameleon) pour utiliser icon:icons/minecraft.icns puis que vous supprimez ce pack, votre jeu ne se lance pas. Si cela vous arrive, désactivez Chameleon (ou supprimer sa configuration).
